description: Expresses "custom ui/demos/demo-7.html" (Zomato full coverage) as a real layout for essdee_yrp /web. Carries demo-7's full intent: extended knobs beyond the v1 schema (nav.position/home, dateFormat, links, realtime, chrome, detail, entry, dcEntry, actions, blocks, extra theme tokens incl. dark palette) are kept as additive keys pending engine support — the controller treats them as soft warnings.
